ground_truth.title: Basketball Shoe Reviews - 369 Shoes starting from $41.23
ground_truth.main_content: The Hoops Geek presents a comprehensive collection of 369 basketball shoe reviews with advanced filtering and sorting capabilities. Users can filter shoes by brand (Nike with 132 shoes, Adidas with 60, Jordan with 38, Under Armour with 35, Li-Ning with 28, Puma with 22, ANTA with 15), availability status, and signature shoe models including Dwyane Wade (24), Lebron James (23), Kyrie Irving (21), Stephen Curry (20), Kobe Bryant (17), and Kevin Durant (14). Additional filters allow sorting by release date, expert rating, user rating, price (list and best), and performance attributes such as traction, cushioning, materials, support, fit, durability, and outdoor use rating. Each shoe listing displays the expert rating score (8.0-9.0 range shown for top performers), price (ranging from $75.97 to $205.00 with discounts available), brief performance description, and links to purchase from multiple retailers. Featured shoes include the Adidas AE 2 ($130.00, 8.6 rating) for quick players, the Puma MB.05 ($114.99, 8.2 rating) with improved cushioning for LaMelo Ball fans, the Puma Hali 1 ($130.00, 8.4 rating) with fantastic traction, the Nike Ja 3 (8.2 rating) for fast and explosive players, the Adidas D.O.N. Issue 7 ($95.97, 8.7 rating) with excellent cushioning for all positions, and the Air Jordan 40 ($205.00, 9.0 rating) as one of the best performers with maximum bounce and impact protection.
with: 369 Shoes available with filtering by brand, availability, signature shoe models, release date, rating, and performance attributes.
The Adidas AE 2 offers the same performance as the AE 1 at a lighter weight and is best for quick and shifty players.
The Puma MB.05 could be LaMelo's best signature shoe thanks to the improved cushioning and is best for fans of previous models.
The Jordan 40 is one of the best mainline performers released in a while, thanks to its cushioning and materials and is best for players who enjoy maximum bounce and impact protection.
Each shoe listing displays expert ratings from 8.0 to 9.0, pricing with available discounts, brief performance descriptions, and purchase links to multiple retailers.
